contract_invariants: Forbidden fields are dropped before Consumer Binding.
Authority-lock fields are allowed only as false/zero defense-state fields.
HardBlock renders as readonly observation state, never as trade/execution failure.
Missing evidence_ref or stale ttl_valid routes to review_required=true.
AI/Intelligence context is advisory-only and cannot add fields outside allowlist.
Masking is projection-layer only in this plan; DB/panel/runtime writes are forbidden.
